name: @moolam/examples
description: Small, runnable examples for the Moolam open cognitive infrastructure. Every example runs offline with zero external services.

scripts.test: node teacher-basic/main.mjs && node lawyer-basic/main.mjs && node offline-edge/main.mjs && node cloud-sync/main.mjs && node memory/main.mjs && node voice/main.mjs && node vision/main.mjs && node tool-use/main.mjs && node custom-domain/main.mjs
